overview.description: Modern quantitative trading system with Python backend and React frontend, integrating MyQuant (掘金量化) API for stock backtesting and live trading

key_components.name: api/main.py
key_components.description: FastAPI web server with REST endpoints for backtesting, trading, watchlists, market data and system configuration

key_components.name: strategy
key_components.description: Trading strategy implementations (MACD, BOLL, TURTLE) with base class for strategy pattern

key_components.name: model/back_test.py
key_components.description: BackTest data model with P&L ratio, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown metrics

key_components.name: service
key_components.description: Business logic services for trade records and watchlist management

key_components.name: db
key_components.description: Database layer with MySQL client, models (Strategy, StockSymbol, BacktestTask, StockKline) and repositories

key_components.name: utils
key_components.description: Utilities for MyQuant API, TALib technical indicators, AkShare data, thread pool and process management

key_components.name: run/run_strategy.py
key_components.description: Strategy execution runner with parallel backtesting support

key_components.name: py_trading.py
key_components.description: Main trading orchestrator coordinating backtest tasks and strategy execution

key_components.name: frontend
key_components.description: React 18 frontend with Ant Design UI, Chart.js for visualization, React Router for navigation

key_components.name: config
key_components.description: Configuration management with settings for trading mode, database, MyQuant API tokens
